title: The Disease and the Sacrifice
description: Noland and Calgara’s bond grows as the people of Shandora begin to see a path beyond fear and sacrifice.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene focuses on Mont Blanc Noland, Calgara, Enel, Shandia villager, Shandia warrior. Noland and Calgara’s bond grows as the people of Shandora begin to see a path beyond fear and sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Noland
dialogue.text: Could he be Lord Kashi's child...?

dialogue.speaker: Shandia villager
dialogue.text: Just what will I die from...?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Divine judgment!? or a mere accident!?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Are you terrified of God that much!?

dialogue.speaker: Shandia warrior
dialogue.text: I can at least hear the voice...

summary: Noland and Calgara’s bond grows as the people of Shandora begin to see a path beyond fear and sacrifice.
